summary: SUCCESS: Phase 5 Testing & Validation COMPLETE - All 31 plugin tests passing (100%). Test infrastructure production-ready. Ready for Phase 6 (Documentation & Release).
completed_this_session: Fixed hook test input formats (tool/params/result → tool_name/tool_input/tool_response)
Enhanced test runner assertion validation (nested structures, skill arrays)
Fixed hook validator execution (plugin_root, environment variables, timeouts)
Standardized skill naming (removed pop- prefix from 7 skill frontmatter names)
Removed hardcoded paths from skills (bug-reporter example path)
Achieved 100% test pass rate: 31/31 tests passing (up from 19/31 - 61.3%)

phase_6_tasks: Conduct real UAT with beta users

resume_context.what_we_did: Achieved 100% plugin test pass rate (31/31) by fixing hook protocols, test runner assertions, and skill naming. Phase 5 (Testing & Validation) is now COMPLETE.
resume_context.why_it_matters: Test infrastructure is production-ready. Can confidently proceed to Phase 6 (Documentation & Release) knowing all components are validated.
resume_context.what_changed: Fixed 12 test failures through systematic debugging: hook input formats, assertion validation, execution environment, skill naming, hardcoded paths.
resume_context.critical_next_step: COMMIT test fixes, then RESTART Claude Code with new plugin loading command to verify orchestration works programmatically.
resume_context.expected_outcome: After restart, all PopKit features should work programmatically via hooks, not LLM improvisation.

notes: Phase 5 (Testing & Validation) COMPLETE - 100% test pass rate
